description: A distributed caching cluster in the `data-grid` namespace is failing to form because its pods cannot discover each other via DNS. The cluster consists of a Service named `cache-discovery` and a StatefulSet named `cache-nodes`. Diagnose and fix the configuration errors preventing cluster formation. Ensure the `cache-discovery` Service is configured as a headless service and that its selector correctly targets the StatefulSet pods. The `cache-nodes` StatefulSet must be associated with the `cache-discovery` service, and the `CLUSTER_DOMAIN` environment variable in the pod template must be updated to the service's fully qualified domain name. Access the environment at https://localhost using credentials admin / Admin12345678!.

metadata.occupation: Data Platform Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
